sp_widget.description: Confirmation page widget showing claim submission details and progress timeline
sp_widget.name: Medtric Claim Confirmation
sp_widget.template:
Warranty Claim Submitted Successfully

Your claim has been received and is being processed by our AI agent.

Claim Number
{{c.data.claim.number}}
Status
Under Review by AI Agent
Expected Resolution
{{c.data.claim.expected_resolution}}

Claim Progress

{{stage.label}}

Our AI Agent is currently analyzing your warranty coverage, device history, and claim eligibility. This typically takes 1-2 business days.

Need Help?

Our Virtual Agent is available 24/7 to help answer questions about your claim. Look for the chat icon in the bottom-right corner.

support@medtric.com
1-800-MEDTRIC (1-800-633-8742)
Notice: {{c.data.error}}
